text.title: Agent Trajectory Eval Method Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are trajectory logs (per-tool call + args + return) available for the agent under test?

branch.when: logs_available == true AND golden_set_ready == true AND judge_fresh_or_rule_based == true

conclusion.verdict: Run the eval. Emit three-layer report with CI.

branch.when: logs_available == true AND golden_set_ready == true AND judge_fresh_or_rule_based == false

conclusion.verdict: Recalibrate the judge first; then run eval.
Build the golden set first. Trajectory eval without a frozen set is non-comparable.
Escalate — closed/no-log harness. Instrument the harness before adopting this methodology.
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.
